svg.title: Cortex — full cycle state machine
svg.desc: Autonomous cycle flow: orchestrate writes task-queue.json → explore → plan → implement (parallel, git-scoped) → reconcile → test (25 turns/slice, 10 retries) → fix injection → recovery → deliver, with budget tracking, dead man timer, and NEEDS_HUMAN_INPUT escalation
svg.text: Load prompt · invoke skills · write queue
